metadata.description: PNPAIDevelopmentAgency — plug-and-play AI development workflow for Claude Code. Two role profiles, two platform adapters, hard guardrails.

plugins.name: pnpai-core
plugins.description: Orchestration skill, three subagents (Researcher, Explorer, Verifier), pre/post-tool-use hooks. Required.

plugins.name: pnpai-role-trainee
plugins.description: Junior role. Opens PRs; hooks block merge, force-push, and writes to base branches.

plugins.name: pnpai-role-senior
plugins.description: Full contributor role. Can merge, can hotfix. Verifier still mandatory.

plugins.name: pnpai-platform-github
plugins.description: GitHub Issues + PRs adapter. Maps abstract operations to mcp__github__*.

plugins.name: pnpai-platform-azure-devops
plugins.description: Azure DevOps Boards + Repos adapter. Maps abstract operations to mcp__azure-devops__*.

plugins.name: pnpai-verification-node
plugins.description: Verifier preset for Node / TypeScript projects.
